jobs.title: Business Analyst 1
jobs.description: The North Carolina Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services is seeking a Business Analyst 1 to support the technical and business needs of statewide driver and vehicle systems. This role involves performing analytical tasks, system analysis, process documentation, and stakeholder communication to ensure system enhancements function correctly. Responsibilities Review functions and assess operational needs for Driver Licensing and Motor Vehicle systems Record changes to processes and capture business requirements for updates Develop and assess testing plans to confirm system enhancements

jobs.title: Senior Program Manager / Business Analyst
jobs.description:
About the position

The Senior Program Manager / Business Analyst will serve as a strategic leader and subject matter expert in driving large-scale, data-driven transformation across Asset Management. This role goes beyond project execution — it demands the ability to shape program strategy, influence senior stakeholders, and architect scalable solutions that align data capabilities with long-term business objectives. jobs.description: Who We Are Join a team that puts its People First! As a member of the First American family of companies, First American Trust is a federal savings bank that has provided banking, wealth management, and trust solutions on a national, full-service basis for more than five decades. Since 1889, First American (NYSE FAF) has held an unwavering belief in its people.
